programs.title: Global Business-Asian Edition
programs.desc: Global Business is the flagship business show of CGTN English Channel, bringing you the latest economic data, business trends and policies.

programs.title: From Island Farms to Cloud Power, From Mountain Hubs to Urban Beats
programs.desc: From tropical coffee aromas to high-tech computing hubs, how is China defining \"high-quality development\"? In this episode of Meet China, we journey from the fields of Wanning, Hainan, where a small coffee bean becomes a symbol of the Free Trade Port’s opening-up, to the mountains of Guizhou, where a 14-millisecond data latency is powering the rendering of global blockbusters like Ne Zha 2. Finally, we dive into the vibrant Livehouse scene of China’s megacities, exploring a $1.2 billion \"emotional economy\" that is reshaping urban nightlife. From solid digital infrastructure to the rhythmic energy of the music scene, this episode captures the heartbeat of China’s evolving economic future.

programs.title: Inside the token surge: Where does the money flow in AI?
programs.desc: From \"OpenClaw\" to open-source AI agents, token demand is exploding. But where's the real money? \nCGTN x top AI experts on the AI gold rush, key players, and the inside track on where the money flows. Listen now.
